findings.message: Unbounded list field: 'items' returns a list[Item] with no pagination (limit/offset, first/after, or cursor-based). As the items table grows, this query could return unbounded results, causing performance and memory issues.
findings.suggestion: Add pagination parameters (e.g., limit and offset, or cursor-based pagination with first/after) to the items field to ensure bounded result sets. Example: 'def items(self, info: strawberry.Info, limit: int = 10, offset: int = 0) -> list[Item]:'
